org.apache.dubbo.remoting.telnet

接口 TelnetHandler

  • 所有已知子接口:
    ExchangeHandler, TelnetHandler
    所有已知实现类:
    ChangeTelnetHandler, ClearTelnetHandler, CountTelnetHandler, CurrentTelnetHandler, ExchangeHandlerAdapter, ExchangeHandlerDispatcher, ExitTelnetHandler, HelpTelnetHandler, InvokeTelnetHandler, ListTelnetHandler, LogTelnetHandler, LogTelnetHandler, PortTelnetHandler, SelectTelnetHandler, ShutdownTelnetHandler, StatusTelnetHandler, TelnetHandlerAdapter, TraceTelnetHandler

    @SPI
public interface TelnetHandler
    TelnetHandler

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法
